questions.question: 对纽结 7_2 的一个图解 (有 7 个交叉) 应用 Reidemeister R2 move (引入一对反号交叉)。操作之后图解有多少个交叉？

counterfactual.explanation: Real R2 inserts a (+1, -1) crossing pair so writhe is preserved. Forcing same-sign pair gives a 'pseudo R2' that changes writhe by ±2 and breaks topological invariants.
Flipping one crossing's over/under is not a Reidemeister move; it changes the knot type, so signature / determinant / Alexander all generally change.
Dropping planarity (swapping strand labels at random) yields an inconsistent diagram. This shows the planarity constraint is structurally required for any topological reasoning.
